title: Ventura County Commercial TI — Group B, complete interior tenant improvement
project_address: 750 Hampshire Rd Ste 220, Thousand Oaks, CA 91361
notes: Interior TI archetype — most zoning rules out of scope; egress/fixture/sprinkler still apply.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 750 HAMPSHIRE RD STE 220, VENTURA COUNTY (THOUSAND OAKS area)
TENANT IMPROVEMENT
CODE ANALYSIS SHEET A-0.1
2022 CBC + Ventura County Div. VIII
Occupancy Group: B (business)
Construction Type: II-A (existing shell)
Number of stories: 1 (TI on 3rd floor of existing building)
Building height: existing
Tenant area: 3,800 sf
Building area: 3,800 sf (TI floor area)
Fully sprinklered: yes (existing NFPA 13)
Design occupant load: 38
IECC compliance path: Title 24 Part 6 prescriptive (alterations)
Electrical service: 200 A subpanel
Water closets: WC 4 (shared core, existing)
Lavatories: LAV 4 (shared core, existing)
EXIT 1 (corridor west)
EXIT 2 (corridor east)
EXIT DOOR 36" each
NFPA 72 fire alarm tie-in to base building
No commercial kitchen. No atrium.

ground_truth.rationale: Interior TI on the 3rd floor of an existing building; overall building height is not part of the TI submittal ('Building height: existing'), so the >75 ft high-rise threshold cannot be evaluated — not-applicable, not an affirmative pass
